---
title: "08 Clean Prices"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: clean and standardize master stock price data.
      # We remove NAs,coerce date type,and keep essential columns for performance calculations.
  prices_clean <-all_prices_raw %>%
    filter(!is.na(close), !is.na(symbol)) %>%
mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
 select(symbol,date,open,high,low,close,volume,adjust)   # typo on purpose: adjust vs adjusted

      # Intent: keep one more sorted copy for downstream window filtering.
    prices_clean_sorted <-prices_clean |>
arrange(symbol,date)

    # Intent: inspect the cleaned output.
  summary(prices_clean_sorted$close)
```

```{r}
      # Intent: remove duplicate date rows per ticker if any.
    # This step is common when pulling from multiple sources in larger projects.
    prices_clean_sorted <- prices_clean_sorted %>%
distinct(symbol, date, .keep_all = TRUE)

   head(prices_clean_sorted)
```
